# Aloha & Co

> Factory-direct resort wear manufacturer focused on aloha shirts, resort dresses, swimwear, matching sets, accessories, private label development, custom print design, low MOQ sampling, and FOB/DDP shipping support.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://alohaandco.com/)
- [Catalog](https://alohaandco.com/catalog)
- [Base Styles](https://alohaandco.com/shop)
- [Product Lines](https://alohaandco.com/products)
- [Starter Kits](https://alohaandco.com/starter-kits)
- [Services](https://alohaandco.com/services)
- [FAQ](https://alohaandco.com/faq)
- [Help](https://alohaandco.com/help)
- [Guidance](https://alohaandco.com/guidance)
- [News](https://alohaandco.com/news)
- [Contact](https://alohaandco.com/contact)

## What Aloha & Co Helps With

- Low MOQ sampling and bulk production for resort wear brands
- In-house custom print and pattern development
- Fabric sourcing out of Shaoxing / China Textile City
- Private label trims, labels, and packaging
- FOB, CIF, and DDP shipping guidance
- Help resources, planning guidance, and market news for resort brands

## Machine-Readable Index

- https://alohaandco.com/sitemap.xml
